title: The Quest for Floofer Kaploofer
summary: Dimitar the dragonet and his tall friend Icicle embark on a high-seas adventure to the mysterious Rainbow Forest Island. Their mission: to rescue the lost Floofer Kaploofer. Guided by colorful flashlights and joined by a resourceful mouse named Hattie, the group journeys through forests of every hue. After discovering the missing floofer buried in the orange sands, they work together to clean her up and bring her safely back home to the Floofer Cloud.
audioFilename: Dimitar and Icicle rescue a floofer from rainbow forest.m4a

highlightQuote.text: It was red, orange, green, and blue and pink and purple and silver and gold. Actually, it was just pink, purple, silver and gold.

transcript.text: Dad, you know what I used to do? I used to find my mama's phone and give it to her.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's helpful. Alright, let me turn the light. Stars. Okay. You want to get in bed?
Bedtime story! I don't want to get in your lap.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, where should I go?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You can go anywhere you want. But maybe you can sit on the bed.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I'll sit right here so I'm close to you. Now we can tell a story about their adventure, Dimitar and Icicle.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes. How does it start?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: How? Well, sailing on the ship. Dimitar and Icicle were sailing across the ocean on the pirate ship. And where were they headed?
Rainbow Forest! You picked Rainbow Forest.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Yes, the Rainbow Forest is on an island far across the ocean. And Dimitar and Icicle were standing on the deck of the ship feeling the breeze on their faces, whoosh! And riding up and down on the waves as the ship rocked back and forth. And Icicle said, 'Oh, look up ahead there!' And Dimitar said, 'Where? Where?' 'Oh, you don't see it? Ha ha, you're short, aren't you?' Because Icicle was much taller than Dimitar, who was just a little dragonet. But Dimitar flew straight up to the crow's nest and picked up the telescope and looked out and he said, 'Aha! I see it, everyone! Land ho! It's the Rainbow Forest island!'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And Icicle said, 'I'll fly ahead and check it out.' And Icicle, whoosh, whoosh, whoosh, flapped up into the air and flew towards the Rainbow Forest island. And what did he see? Icicle... Dimitar will be alone on the bow. 'Come back to the boat!' calls Dimitar. Dimitar says, 'I'm lonely, Icicle!'
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And Icicle said, 'Oh, sorry!' and he turned around and flew back to the boat, whoosh, whoosh, whoosh, and landed next to Dimitar. And Dimitar said, 'Yes, let's just sail the boat right up to the island.' And Icicle said, 'Okay.' And so they sailed and sailed over the ocean until they grew close to the Rainbow Forest island and they saw a beautiful sparkling beach where they could pull the boat right up almost out of the water. And the beach was very unusual. What was different about it from a normal beach?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: What?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, a normal beach just has yellow sand and lots of shells that are mostly white. But how did this one look? Was it a different set of colors?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was red, orange, green, and blue and pink and purple and silver and gold. Actually, it was just pink, purple, silver and gold.

And Dimitar said, 'My goodness, look at this beach! It's pink, purple, silver and gold. I've never seen a beach like that! My circular island at home has just regular beaches.' And was it the sand that was different colors or the shells or both?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: It was both. And also the water. But... no, no, no. It was blue.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the water was blue, I see. And Icicle says, 'Yes, it's a very nice beach, but we're here on a mission, remember Dimitar? We've got to stay focused.' And Dimitar said, 'Oh, oh yeah. Wait, what's our mission again?' What was their mission?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Follow the Floofer's trail. Rescuing Floofer. Floofer... it's Floofer Kaploofer who needs help.
And Dimitar said, 'Oh yeah, Floofer Kaploofer. Uh, but how are we going to find Floofer Kaploofer? This is a big island.'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Um, um, a flashlight! Well, Isabella sent her flashlight in the mail in case. And then she's waiting. And now she's waiting by the mailbox. She's waiting for the flashlight to get to you so you can go into Rainbow Forest. Now, now, it's gonna like... now it's there. And then the flashlight landed in... and then it landed in Icicle's hands.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And Icicle said, 'Aha! A flashlight! And it's a good thing too because I see the sun is setting.' And Dimitar said, 'Oh yes, turns out there's beautiful sunsets here at the Rainbow Forest Island.' And the sky was turning all different shades of the rainbow as the sun drew close to the horizon and painted the clouds in all different colors. And the forest in front of them beyond the beach grew quiet as the darkness fell. And Dimitar said, 'Oh, Floofer Kaploofer will be so lonely here in the forest. We better find him.'
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, then someone showed up. Hattie Mousey. Hattie Mousey said, 'Squeak!' 'Oh, hi!' Hattie Mousey said, 'Hey!'
Uh, hi,' said Dimitar. 'What are you doing here, Hattie?'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Hey, hey, I was just wondering if you need anybody to keep you company. Oh, I brought my own flashlight from home. It's blue and Izzy's is red. Mine's blue, but Izzy's is red.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And Icicle said, 'Let's go into the forest.' And so they walked into the Rainbow Forest just as darkness was falling and they turn on their flashlights, click, click. And as they entered the forest, they noticed that unlike the beach, which was lots of different colors, this part of the forest was all one color. What color was it?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Red. And then, and then, Icicle, if you move on to the other colors, you'll see that the forest is rainbow.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh,' says Icicle. 'Yes, the forest is all red here. There's just red trees and red leaves, and even the soil is red. There's red berries on the red bushes. It's a very red place. But yes, just beyond it here, if we walk a little further... crunch, crunch, crunch.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Is it... it's orange. Then, then if you move on that, then you'll see it's yellow. Hattie Mouse! You gotta catch up. You gotta pay attention! Icicle, Dimitar, back to the red with Hattie!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they came back to the red part of the forest and found Hattie. And they said, 'Hattie, do you know if you were a floofer, where you might be in a rainbow forest like this? Hmm.' And Hattie said, 'Well, what color floofer is this Floofer Kaploofer?' And what color was she?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Eh, she was white.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A white floofer. That's very interesting,' says Hattie. 'And now, Hattie Mouse, move on to orange with Icicle and Dimitar. Okay? I don't want anyone to get lost, so everyone hold hands or even wings.' So they all held hands as they walked through the forest from the red part to the orange part.

To the yellow part, the green part, and the blue part. Yes. And then the... then indigo and violet parts. And then even pink and purple parts. And even silver and gold parts. And then they heard, 'Hello! I'm... I'm buried in the sand of the orange!'
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: What was that?' said Hattie.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was the floofer! No, no, no. Not on the beach. In the orange.

Oh,' said Icicle. 'No, she said she's buried in the sand in the orange forest. Let's go there.' And so they rushed all the way back through all the different colors of the forest, through the silver and gold and purple and pink and blue and green and yellow until they got to the orange forest. And what did they see there?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And then they had to dig. And then when they felt something, they knew it was a floofer. Hattie Mousey! But she used her gardening gloves just in case any spiders. A white dusty orange floofer.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh my goodness, it's Floofer Kaploofer! We found you!'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But I'm all dirty with orange!'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: How can we wash you off?' said Icicle. 'A bath? I could use my freezing ice breath to freeze that orange dust off of you. How's that? Ha ha!'

And then Hattie got some... and then she ran back to her house and returned with a little bunch of ice cubes. And then, and then, she scrubbed Floofer Padoofer off. And then she ran back to her house and got a towel and dried the floofer off.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And Floofer Kaploofer said, 'Oh thank you! I was just digging around for some shells and I must have fallen into a hole and I got stuck here and I'm so glad that you found me. And it was Hattie the mouse who dug me out. Thank you, Hattie! And what are your names?'
Icicle and Dimitar, of course!'
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, you must be dragons! I've heard about dragons but never met any. I'm glad you're nice. But now I need to get back home to the Floofer Cloud. Could you take me there, please?' And Icicle said, 'Why yes. We got here on our big pirate ship over there. Would you like to come back with us that way?' And Floofer Kaploofer said, 'Okay, thank you.' And they all got on the ship and what did they do while they were sailing back to the Floofer Cloud?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: They sang some songs. Fox. The fox one. What does the fox say? Ring-ding-ding-ding-dingeringeding!'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Alright. That's the end of Stars and Stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wait, I want to do the lantern. Wait, I want to do shadow... shadow puppet. Oh, is that a finger llama? I like it. Sneaky mouse. Sneaky mouse too. And a bird. I learned how to make a bird from school. And then a heart.
A heart. Wow. Okay. I'll turn it off.
transcript.speaker: Dad
